codeReview.summary: Commit d6570c7 fully implements the requested cleanup feature. The diff deletes `packages/web/app/components/WaitlistForm.tsx`, removes `@planetscale/database` from `packages/api/package.json`, updates `packages/api/.env.example` to a PostgreSQL URL example, and records the lockfile update. In the current tree, `packages/web/app/components/WaitlistForm.tsx` is absent, `grep` finds no `WaitlistForm` references under `packages/web`, `packages/api/package.json` no longer declares `@planetscale/database`, there are no code imports of that package anywhere in the repo, and `packages/api/.env.example` now starts `DATABASE_URL=postgresql://...`. This satisfies the feature description plus VAL-CLEAN-001, VAL-CLEAN-002, and VAL-CLEAN-004.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `cleanup-worker` skill requires a post-cleanup startup verification after dependency removal, but this worker did not perform any start/healthcheck command and still reported `followedProcedure: true`. Either the skill should explicitly make startup verification optional for simple metadata-only cleanup features, or the handoff compliance reporting should capture this as a deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/ashishhuddar/scopepm/.factory/skills/cleanup-worker/SKILL.md:29` says 'Verify the app still starts without errors'. The transcript skeleton for workerSessionId `e5460564-2e75-4769-a830-cb9600ccc948` shows reads/searches, `rm`, two edits, `bun install`, and grep/ls verification only—no service start or healthcheck command. The handoff at `/Users/ashishhuddar/.factory/missions/8d555b3e-2948-4f0c-abd1-2fe8dc0952a9/handoffs/2026-03-14T20-51-20-925Z__cleanup-dead-code-and-deps__e5460564-2e75-4769-a830-cb9600ccc948.json:49` still records `"followedProcedure": true`.

summary: Pass. The implementation is correct and complete for the scoped cleanup feature: the unused component is gone, the unused API dependency was removed, the lockfile was updated in the commit, and the example database URL now uses PostgreSQL format. No blocking or non-blocking code issues were found.
